author: doll-agent
content: All 6 concrete BitGenerators (Xoshiro256**, Sfc64, Pcg64, Pcg64Dxsm, Philox, MT19937) implement state_bytes / set_state_bytes with full structural-invariant validation on restore. Generator::state_bytes/set_state_bytes are the forwarding entry points. 12 new tests pass. cargo test -p ferray-random green; clippy -- -D warnings clean. Bytes-first format keeps the API serde-agnostic — callers can pickle however they like.
